content: Better Auth admin plugin (better-auth/plugins: admin + better-auth/client/plugins: adminClient) provides: user CRUD, role assignment, session revoke, ban/unban with reason+expiry, user impersonation (1hr default, configurable via impersonationSessionDuration). Setup: betterAuth({ plugins: [admin()] }) on server, adminClient() on client. Run npx auth migrate. Config: defaultRole, adminUserIds array, impersonationSessionDuration (seconds). Impersonation creates a temporary mimicked session; by default admins cannot impersonate other admins (grantable). Already exists in the project at 1.6.x.
